entries.title: REFAL

entries.note: Recovered manually 2026-05-16: leaf 13/400 has 4 distinct REFALET predios (Manacor, Algaida, Lluchmayor, Artá). The Claude-text pass captured only the Manacor one; this is the missing N-th.
